title: Stephen R. Bourne
body: Stephen Richard "Steve" Bourne (born 7 January 1944) is an English computer scientist based in the United States for most of his career. He is well known as the author of the Bourne shell (sh), which is the foundation for the standard command-line interfaces to Unix.
categories: Articles lacking reliable references from June 2020
BLP articles lacking sources from September 2009
British expatriate academics in the United States
Fellows of the Association for Computing Machinery
